title: The knife of Delta
description: This resource pack brings a skin knives from the FPS game Delta Force into Minecraft. The Stick Sword delivers a feel that’s totally distinct from those generic short sword textures — definitely worth a try!
body:
# The knife skin
- **Diamond sword------North Star**
- **netherite sword------Shadow Edge**
- **iron sword-----------Mercy**
- **copper sword--------Skeleton Knife**(_I noticed the Dragon Tooth has the exact same model as the Tactical Dagger, so I swapped it out for the Skeleton Knife design instead. My bad!)_
- **stone sword---------Tactical Dagger**
- **wooden sword-------Scarlet Owl**
 - **golden sword--------Black Hawk**
-   **_For specific demonstration, please go to gallery_**

## Hand feel aspect
- **Every sword except the Wooden Sword now sports the Stick Sword texture. On top of that, all axes have been revamped with the Black Sea skin — and the impact feel is way more satisfying!**

### Update
**I don't know much about programming, so right now I can only make these simple textures.** **I want to add impact sound effects to this resource pack — I've got the audio files ready, but they just won't work. I'll keep trying my best to fix this issuelater!**
